query:
INSERT INTO system_settings (settingKey, settingValue, description) 
VALUES ('quotation_approval_threshold', '10000', '报价单金额超过此阈值时需要管理员审批（单位：USD）')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE settingValue = '10000'
